name: Test Coverage Reminder
description: Remind to add tests when new Python modules are created or significant code is added without corresponding tests

on_failure.message: New Python module created without corresponding tests. Consider adding tests to maintain code quality.
suggestions: Add unit tests for public functions and classes
Include edge case and error condition tests
Ensure test coverage meets the 90% minimum requirement

actions.command: python -c "import ast; import sys; tree = ast.parse(open('${TRIGGER_FILE}').read()); funcs = [n for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef) and not n.name.startswith('_')]; classes = [n for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.ClassDef)]; print(f'Found {len(funcs)} public functions and {len(classes)} classes'); sys.exit(1 if len(funcs) + len(classes) > 3 else 0)"

on_failure.message: Significant code added (>3 public functions/classes). Please ensure adequate test coverage.
